comments.LineComment: | Element Context — What atoms apply to what elements.
| At 10,000 tokens/second, an agent configuring UI needs:
| 1. Immediate comprehension — What can I modify here?
| 2. Bounded choices — The RIGHT atoms for this element type
| 3. Composable layers — Surface → Material → Motion → Haptics
| 4. Zero ambiguity — Same config = same output
| ElementContext defines the **property signature** of any element:
| what property groups apply, how they're organized, and their bounds.
| Properties are organized into logical groups for human and agent UX:
| This is enforced at the type level.

value.value: Visual effects: glow, shadow, elevation, blur
